title: Including Monday Docs in a Monday App
excerpt: I’m creating an app to share with my clients. It is working except that the Monday docs that I have included in my workspace are not showing up when installing the app on another account. The boards show up fine, but the…

posts.author: Suzette (Suzette Welling)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m creating an app to share with my clients. It is working except that the Monday docs that I have included in my workspace are not showing up when installing the app on another account. The boards show up fine, but the document templates are not.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Suzette and welcome to the community!

Please open a ticket here and our team will take a look into it!

Cheers,
Matias
